/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libspdlog.so.1.17 -o libspdlog.so.1.17.0 CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/spdlog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/stdout_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/color_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/file_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/async.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/cfg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/bundled_fmtlib_format.cpp.o
